name: Cumtopia – Where Cum Is Fortune
description:
In the year 2048, the world no longer runs on gold, dollars, or crypto. It runs on cum.

 

After the total collapse of the global financial system in 2040, humanity faced its darkest hour. Traditional money became worthless. Digital currencies were obliterated. Governments fell. Chaos reigned.

Then came the most audacious, depraved, and brilliantly effective economic revolution in human history.

Scientists discovered that fresh human semen contained a unique, naturally occurring “biometric blockchain” — a complex matrix of hormones, proteins, and DNA markers that was impossible to perfectly counterfeit, instantly verifiable, renewable through the male body, and directly tied to physical arousal and pleasure. The thicker, the more voluminous, the higher the hormone surge, the sweeter the taste — the more valuable the load.

In 2043, the desperate remnants of world governments made the only decision that could save civilization:

They made semen the official global currency.

They called this new era Cumtopia.

And society has never been the same.

The Cum Currency System 

 

Semen reigns as the universal medium, with everything priced in "Loads" — a Standard Load being the average 4–6 ml gush from a healthy adult male, warm and pulsing with economic potential. Value hinges on quality, scanned in seconds by ubiquitous Load Analyzers that delve into the biochemical depths: the thick ropes, teeming swimmers, hormone rush, tingling pH, and inviting aroma. Higher tiers turn a single explosive release into fortune, urging men to optimize with diets, workouts, and edging marathons.

 

Load Verification and Payment Process


Freshness is king — ejaculated within 10 minutes to preserve enzymatic integrity, or the load degrades into worthless sludge. Load Analyzers verify instantly, issuing receipts for digital wallets. Big buys use Cum Accumulators for multi-spurt collection, but with freshness fees. Public Extraction Booths dot streets, where men blast payloads alone or with assistants, turning quick wanks into cash. 

Higher Value Tiers are graded by scanners on scientific metrics


  • Tier 1 Load (Elite): Explosive hormone surges, ultra-dense viscosity like molten honey, sky-high sperm motility, balanced pH for that addictive tang, and gourmet scent/flavor. Worth 10–20x a Standard Load. Producers are rockstars, their balls guarded like national treasures. 

  • Tier 2 Load (Premium): Generous volume (7–10 ml of thick, ropey bliss), strong density that clings deliciously, balanced hormones fueling endless arousal, and appealing aroma that beckons like perfume
creator: Eunha Fontera
